description.ko: 유기적 생명체와 합성 데이터의 교차점에 대한 시각적 탐구입니다. 플로라-9은 자연이 디지털 시대에 적응하여 수정 구조와 광섬유 생물학을 통해 빛과 정보로 고동치는 미래를 나타냅니다.
description.en: A visual exploration of the intersection between organic life and synthetic data. FLORA-9 represents a future where nature has adapted to the digital age, pulsing with light and information through crystalline structures and fiber-optic biology.

prompt: Hyper-realistic macro photography of FLORA-9, a futuristic cybernetic flower with translucent obsidian petals and glowing neon circuitry veins. Bioluminescent pollen drifting in the air as digital glitch particles. Soft focus background of a high-tech greenhouse with deep blue and magenta ambient lighting, 8k resolution, cinematic lighting, intricate details of liquid crystal textures.
